programme.title: Dating a Sugar Daddy: Vogue Williams Investigates
programme.desc: Television personality Vogue Williams travels across Europe to explore the world of sugar daddies, sugar babies and have common questions answered by those involved.

programme.title: How To Have A Better Orgasm
programme.desc: Women share how their experience of orgasms has improved thanks to better interpersonal communication, or just making time for themselves. Personal accounts reveal that, across the board, there's a turning point in learning how to have a better one.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Jasmine is a paramedic science student worried that she is about to get kicked off her course because of her work as an exotic dancer, and web-cammer; Carly Ray carried on with sex work after graduation and is now an award-winning porn star.

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Ella has been bullied out of her university after her peers discovered she was an award-winning porn star, and Akonne is a sports science student and a stripper who doesn't consider himself to be a sex worker.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: The Outlaw Country King
True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Excited to go on a date with her crush, Carlita is surprised to end up at his mother's house instead; "RuPaul's Drag Race" contestant Vanessa Vanjie Mateo goes on a date in Texas and when her date starts ignoring her, all hell starts breaking loose.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Alex goes on a karaoke date with Kevin, but is sad to learn that Kevin invited some friends.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Rap sensation and author Logic, along with Big Lenbo, cook up chicken curry while sharing Logic's journey from teenage poverty to global music stardom.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Mario Lopez and his wife show off their Los Angeles home.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Hotel Freedia needs more funding; Tootie and Crystal discuss Freedia's businesses; Freedia decides her next project will be a gospel album.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Devon and Crystal voice their concerns about Freedia's gospel album; Tootie wants to be a travel agent; Crystal shares a personal story from her past.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: The team goes to Los Angeles to advance their business ventures and perform at the star-studded Truth Awards.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia and Reid go on a tour of the potential new home of hotel Freedia; Meredith starts a Cuban Artists Outreach.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Queen of Country
programme.desc: The story of multi-award winning country performer Dolly Parton.

programme.title: Stevie Nicks: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: For decades, Stevie Nicks has fronted one of the most successful bands in history, resurrecting them from the ashes; even with the trials and tribulations of being a member of Fleetwood Mac, Stevie has remained a role model.

programme.title: Blondie: Glass Heart
programme.desc: The story of Blondie and their rise from small clubs in New York City to selling out shows around the globe.

programme.title: Cheaters
programme.desc: Brittany wants to find out why her boyfriend, Taylor, has become distant.

programme.title: Better Criminal
programme.desc: A detective in the LAPD is forced to work for two warring crime syndicates while under an internal investigation.

programme.title: Righteous Thieves
programme.desc: Annabel, the leader of a secret organization engaged in the recovery of priceless artwork, assembles a ragtag crew of art thieves to recover a Monet, Picasso, Degas and Van Gogh stolen by Nazis during WWII.

programme.title: Elvis & the Memphis Mafia
programme.desc: Exploring Elvis' life through the eyes of The Memphis Mafia — a select group of friends he entrusted with his life — from the highs to the lows.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Sofia Franklyn joins Weezy in finding out the world of stripping isn't run by the women that power the industry; Reagan informs Weezy of the stripper strike; Candace Cain teaches the girls how to interact with the pole.

programme.title: Reggie Yates' Extreme Russia
programme.sub-title: Teen Model Factory and Six Packs
programme.desc: Reggie Yates visits Siberia to meet the young girls who are going to extreme lengths to attract the international scouts and make it as fashion models in the West; Reggie investigates the ways in which male body culture is impacting young men.

programme.title: Reggie Yates' Extreme South Africa
programme.desc: Reggie spends a week in South Africa's largest white squatter camp, Coronation Park, outside Johannesburg.

programme.title: Van Halen: A Mammoth Legacy
programme.desc: The career of Van Halen was as tumultuous as it was lucrative; they came to redefine the world of Rock and Roll; through all the trials and tribulations the band endured, their fame and influence in rock is cemented; this is the Mammoth Legacy of Van Halen.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Allie falls for a handsome pilot who lives in her building. But when he disappears Allie is left heartbroken until he shows up again. Dorian goes on a date with a girl who has a Jekyll and Hyde-like personality.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: In 1995, Tanya was on a double date driving through the mountains; the boys hunt down an elk and leave the girls stranded in the Utah wilderness; 19-year-old Sam dates a much older army veteran with a dark past and an insatiable sexual appetite.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: The girls go zip lining; a horse sanctuary.

programme.title: Off the Map With Shannen and Holly
programme.desc: A night of music and dancing; Southern cuisine with a local twist.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: The team goes to Los Angeles to advance their business ventures and perform at the star-studded Truth Awards.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia and Reid go on a tour of the potential new home of hotel Freedia; Meredith starts a Cuban Artists Outreach.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when Crystal confronts Tootie; Freedia and Devon meet with potential artists for her label.

programme.title: Big Freedia Means Business
programme.desc: Freedia tries to play peacemaker to Crystal and Tootie; the pressure is on Reid to raise funds for Hotel Freedia.

programme.title: Elvis & the Memphis Mafia
programme.desc: Exploring Elvis' life through the eyes of The Memphis Mafia — a select group of friends he entrusted with his life — from the highs to the lows.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Experts peel back the layers of Priscilla and the Rock 'n' Roll King's controversial love story to cast light on the dysfunction under the dreamy and glamorous surface.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: The Final Hours
programme.desc: An examination of the last day of Elvis Presley's life.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Ruta madre
programme.desc: After he gets his heart broken, a Mexican-American singer embarks on a road trip through Mexico to reconnect with his roots.

programme.title: Eagles: The Long Road
programme.desc: Paying tribute to the life and career of Glenn Frey, one of the main band members. Revisiting the achievements of one of the best- selling and most loved American rock bands of all time.
